executor_evidence: T02 implemented, then quality-fixed. Final state: pure Zod helper module with only zod import. OwnershipEntrySchema now validates owner_task_id actors by mode: read_only/shared_append require task-like ids or orchestrator; exclusive_write/sequenced_write require task-like ids unless orchestrator has documented pre-registry provenance; orchestrator_owned requires orchestrator. Path validation now rejects leading slash, any backslash, parent-directory segments, empty segments, and any leading drive prefix matching ^[A-Za-z]:, including C:secret.ts/C:foo. OwnershipEvidenceSchema applies this path validation to all changed-file path arrays and changed_files[].path. Helper-test conflict resolved with own-T02-helper-test-fix ownership entry. 207 pass, 0 fail, 271 expect() calls. Typecheck passes clean.

diagnostics_status.summary: LSP server not available for .ts extension in this environment. tsc --noEmit serves as the static analysis gate and passed clean.
